# INTENT

## User Request

Replace the public `/create-new` entry flow with a `/pricing` page.

## Requested Outcome

The pricing page should present three visual plans, include example buttons for a simple tier and a multilanguage tier, and be Polar.sh-compatible in structure without a live integration.

## Constraints

- Remove the old `/create-new` route.
- Keep the pricing UI visual only for now.
- Update existing entry-point links to use `/pricing`.

## Open Questions

- None.
